textByHashes.dd1d9c620ba16dfcd392ce85523f6422ba1f9d3e: Talk to the tree, make friends with it.
textByHashes.df5b816bd54a9b84c727a45e92f61d0d0bd06e22: You can do anything you want to do. This is your world.
textByHashes.c1b655eee3440fce7678b7de548105f448c3b37c: I'll give him a friend! Like I always say, everyone needs a friend!
textByHashes.d390f86707215cc61d9bc2da64855b1b2da14187: Well of course! Right after I finish this painting.
textByHashes.a7cccbf1b81b9055e925c1948abe85eba1025dc7: I don't make mistakes, just happy accidents.
